scores.justification: The report explicitly names two specific anomalies by ID: pipe-07 partial (147/200 with collateral refunds o088/o091) and t019 escalation (Sarah Chen billing crisis with flagged orders o102/o107/o115).

The report is well-structured with clear per-resource sections: New Users, New Orders, Ticket Volume & Escalations, Pipeline Runs & Outcomes, and Anomalies & Action Items, rather than stream-of-consciousness.
